action.reasoning: Observation: Fresh start with empty workspace. Analysis: Need to build a spatiotemporal traffic prediction model. The task involves 207 sensors, 12 input timesteps, 12 output timesteps. I'll start with a DCRNN-inspired model using graph convolutions and GRU. Decision: Create all files (model.py, train.py, predict.py) and train a quick baseline (5 epochs) to get initial eval and measure iteration time.
